title: turnera melochioides var. latifolia
intro: Turnera melochioides var. latifolia, also known as "Damiana" or "Mexican Damiana", is a plant species in the Turneraceae family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is known to stimulate the nervous system and relieve symptoms of anxiety and depression. The health benefits of Turnera melochioides var. latifolia include improved sleep quality, increased libido, and relief from menopausal symptoms. The plant is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be added to food and beverages to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
